# Relation chains across hard breaks

An equality chain split with `\\` aligns its continuations under the first
relation, like an implicit `aligned`:

$$
  x = a \\
    = b \\
    = c
$$

An assignment-led chain (`\gets`) instead anchors the equality continuations
under the assignment's right-hand side:

$$
  \beta \gets f(x) \\
              = g(x) \\
              = h(x)
$$

A non-chain `\\` block is left flush:

$$
  a \\
  b \\
  c
$$
